privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic test data created within Odoo. Ford Transit is a real vehicle make and model from Ford. However, the license plate 'TRK-885-XJ' does not match valid UK or US format standards, and the VIN '1FT-YRN-2025-XK99' is invalid because it contains only 14 characters when cleaned of hyphens, whereas valid VINs must be exactly 17 alphanumeric characters per NHTSA standards. The vendor 'Gemini Fleet Services' is created synthetically by the setup script, and all cost values (650.0 and 125.0) and odometer value (45 miles) are synthetic test data defined within the task configuration.
